title: Technology Partnerships
description: Partnerships with industry, small businesses, universities, government agencies, and other labs bring new technologies to the marketplace.
text:
Championing a Culture of Innovation
Lighting the way for quantum innovation
New Sandia R&D agreements reach levels not seen in three decades
About
With a long history of technology transfer success, Sandia offers partners access to the Labs’ world-class science, advanced technologies, and unique research facilities. Collaborations with industry, small businesses, universities, government agencies, and other labs bring new technologies to the marketplace and contribute to the economic well-being of the nation.
As a Department of Energy/National Nuclear Security Administration (DOE/NNSA) Federally Funded Research and Development Center, Sandia can collaborate with industry, academia, government agencies, and other national labs.
What can Sandia do for you?
I want to…
Work With Sandia
Collaborate and share the results of jointly conducted R&D or otherwise access Sandia expertise.
License Intellectual Property
License technologies and software from Sandia’s extensive portfolio.
Explore Partnering Communities
Access lab offerings and opportunities with ease through local technology communities.
Get Help With My Small Business
Explore ways that New Mexico businesses can get assistance from lab experts at no cost to them.
Utilize Sandia Facilities
Take advantage of Sandia’s unique research centers that are available to outside users.
Learn About Academic Programs
Get to know Sandia’s university partnerships, Postdoc and Fellowship opportunities, and collaborations with university faculty.
Interested in other opportunities to collaborate with Sandia? Browse Federal Contract Opportunities
Sandia has partnered across all 50 states, resulting in billions of dollars in economic impact and the creation of hundreds of thousands of new jobs nationwide.
Financial Conflict of Interest Policy

Highlighting successful collaborations with partners from various sectors.
